## 🧪 How to Test Locally

<!-- Step-by-step instructions on how to test these changes on your computer. -->

1. Run `npm run dev` or `yarn dev` in this repository.
2. Go to `http://localhost:3000/...`
3. Verify that:
   - [ ] Feature works as expected.
   - [ ] No console errors are visible in the browser developer tools.

## 🛡️ DevOps & Cybersecurity Checklist

<!-- Before you click merge, make sure these boxes are checked! -->

- [ ] **No Secrets:** I have NOT committed any hardcoded API keys, `GITHUB_TOKEN`, or private credentials into the code.
